creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
sem         2007-08-05 21:27:30 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia/mplayer   Makefile pkg-plist 
  Added files:
    multimedia/mplayer   Makefile.options Makefile.shared 
    multimedia/mplayer/files patch-libdha-pci.c 
  Log:
  - Split the port into mplayer and mencoder
  - mplayer is now pkg_add'able as it no longer depends on restricted ports
  - Remove compatibility tweaks for FreeBSD-4 as it is no longer supported
  - A patch to correct handle amd64 in libdha-pci.c
  
  PR:             ports/115170
  Submitted by:   maintainer
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.166     +35 -468   ports/multimedia/mplayer/Makefile
  1.1       +285 -0    ports/multimedia/mplayer/Makefile.options (new)
  1.1       +46 -0     ports/multimedia/mplayer/Makefile.shared (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/multimedia/mplayer/files/patch-libdha-pci.c (new)
  1.23      +0 -14     ports/multimedia/mplayer/pkg-plist
